title: Mission above Imperial City
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Youmay|the battle during the Bacta War|another [[Battle of Coruscant/Legends|Battle of Coruscant]]}} {{Otheruses|Imperial City}} {{Battle |prev=[[Ambush at Alderaan]]''[[X-Wing: The Krytos Trap]]'' |conc=[[Trial of Tycho Celchu]] |next=[[Raid on Thyferran Convoy Delta-Two-Niner]]''[[X-Wing: The Bacta War]]'' |image=[[File:Lusankya_escaping_Coruscant.jpg]] |name=Mission above Imperial City |conflict=[[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] ([[Bacta War]]) |date=[[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]] |place=[[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] |result=*[[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] victory **[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] withdrawal |side1=New Republic |side2=[[Palpatine Counter-Insurgency Front]] |side3= |side4= |commanders1=[[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] |commanders2=[[Director of Imperial Intelligence|Director]] [[Ysanne Isard]] |commanders3= |commanders4= |unit1=[[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] |unit2= |unit3= |unit4= |forces1=*10 [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing starfighters]] *1 [[Golan III Space Defense NovaGun]] station *[[Skyhook/Legends|Skyhooks]] **[[Emperor's skyhook]] |forces2=*[[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|''Executor''-class Star Dreadnought]] ''[[Lusankya/Legends|Lusankya]]'' *36 [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighters]] *3 [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|AT-ST]] walkers *[[Airspeeder/Legends|Airspeeders]] *[[Palpatine Counter-Insurgency Front|PCF]] troops |forces3= |forces4= |casual1=*1 [[Skyhook/Legends|skyhook]] |casual2=*3 [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|AT-STs]] *Most PCF troops *31 TIEs |casual3= |casual4= |civilian=*Millions }} {{Quote|We have a report that the Palpatine Counter-insurgency Front is staging from this location for a strike on a bacta storage facility in Invisec. We're flying cover for a commando force that is going to go in. The fact is that these PCF folks are very dedicated to their jobs and are likely to scatter when our forces hit. We expect speeder bikes, swoops, and speeders to be heading out of there. Since they used an airspeeder bomb to hit an earlier site, we have to assume that any and all such vehicles are moving bombs. We're going to take them down.|Commander Wedge Antilles, briefing Rogue Squadron|}} In [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]], the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Squadron/Legends|unit]] [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] flew a '''mission above Imperial City''' to eliminate remaining elements of the [[Palpatine Counter-Insurgency Front]] in the wake of the [[Krytos virus]] incident on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. As the battle above [[Galactic City/Legends|Imperial City]] raged, [[Director of Imperial Intelligence]] [[Ysanne Isard]] blasted away from the planet in the [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|Super Star Destroyer]] ''[[Lusankya/Legends|Lusankya]]'', previously buried beneath the [[City/Legends|city]] surface, [[Death/Legends|killing]] millions of innocent civilians. ==The mission== {{Quote|Three and Four, get back here. Now.''"
"''What's out there, Lead?''"
"''It's something that shouldn't be there, Three. IFF beacons report it's a Super Star Destroyer that goes by the name ''Lusankya''.|Commander Wedge Antilles and Rhysati Ynr|}} In an attempt to provide cover for his impending defection, [[Palpatine Counter-Insurgency Front]] leader [[Kirtan Loor]] ordered his troops to attack a [[bacta storage facility]] in [[Alien Protection Zone/Legends|Invisec]]. This also served as a measure of personal revenge against [[Fliry Vorru]], who controlled the facility. Vorru, however, recognized the signs of the impending attack, and informed [[Borsk Fey'lya]]. Fey'lya in turn arranged for [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] and a [[Commando/Legends|commando]] squad to thwart the attack. At the PCF base, several civilian [[Airspeeder/Legends|airspeeders]] and a trio of [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|All Terrain Scout Transports]] were discovered, along with PCF ground troops. The walkers and troops were quickly eliminated, but a single heavily-laden airspeeder, which [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] realized contained the bomb meant for the [[Bacta/Legends|bacta]] facility, managed to escape. With the aid of observers on an orbital [[Skyhook/Legends|skyhook]], Antilles chased down the airspeeder and managed to destroy it before it could reach its target. At that time, a much greater threat emerged near the [[Manarai Mountains]]. Three [[Squadron/Legends|squadrons]] of [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]] were launched toward the Rogues, and [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|''Executor''-class Star Dreadnought]] ''[[Lusankya/Legends|Lusankya]]'' emerged from beneath [[Galactic City/Legends|Imperial City]], propelled toward orbit by a massive [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] platform. The gargantuan warship demolished every structure within over a hundred square kilometers, resulting in millions of civilian deaths. As it ascended into orbit, the ''Lusankya'' also destroyed a skyhook with [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] fire. The remaining TIEs rushed back to the [[Star Dreadnought/Legends|Star Dreadnought]], but only five of the original thirty-six survived the battle. Rogue pilot [[Erisi Dlarit]], in pursuit of the TIEs, claimed to have been caught in a [[Tractor beam/Legends|tractor beam]]. However, her [[R5-series astromech droid|R5]] [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech]] refuted the claim, revealing that she had been an Imperial spy. While Rogue Squadron returned to base for refueling, the ''Lusankya'' continued to climb and turned its weapons toward Coruscant's [[Planetary shield/Legends|planetary shields]]. The ship quickly punched a hole in the shields and passed through, and encountered a [[Golan III Space Defense NovaGun|Golan III]] orbital defense station. The station quickly exchanged fire with the Super Star Destroyer, but the ''Lusankya'' jettisoned its repulsorlift platform, which absorbed much of the Golan III station's attack. The ''Lusankya'' then jumped to [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] on a course to [[Thyferra/Legends|Thyferra]], where Isard quickly took control of the vital bacta-producing planet, with the full support of the [[Xucphra Corporation]]. ==Aftermath== In the aftermath of the mission, the [[New Republic Provisional Council]] was unwilling to intervene on Thyferra, as they feared interfering with the internal politics of a non-Republic world would cause severe political damage to the fledgling New Republic. Following the lead of [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]], every member of Rogue Squadron resigned in order to stage their own independent effort to overthrow Isard, thus allowing Antilles to keep his promise to [[Ashern]] member [[Qlaern Hirf]]. The conflict which followed was known as the [[Bacta War]]. Nonetheless it was the result of this battle that the New Republic substantially replaced the Galactic Empire as the pre-eminent government of the galaxy, since they had successfully claimed the [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]]. ==Appearances== *''[[X-Wing: The Krytos Trap]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: The Krytos Trap (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}} *''[[X-Wing: The Bacta War]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: The Bacta War (unabridged audiobook)}} {{Mo}} *''[[X-Wing: Wraith Squadron]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: Wraith Squadron (unabridged audiobook)}} {{Mo}} *''[[Legacy of the Force: Betrayal]]'' {{Imo}} ==Sources== *[[The Essential Chronology (real-world book)|''The Essential Chronology'']] {{1stID|mission above Imperial City}} *{{FactFile|9|COR 5-8|Coruscant – Imperial City}} *''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{GCW Bacta War}} {{Interlang |es=Misión sobre la Ciudad Imperial |fi=Coruscantin toinen taistelu (Galaktinen sisällissota) }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Imperial City, mission above}} [[Category:Battles of the Bacta War]] [[Category:Missions to Coruscant]]
